=Index of modules=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Action"| module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Action >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Action_link_key"| module Types.Action_link_key >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Almost"| module Lib.Email_or_phone.Almost >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib.Email_or_phone >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Android"| module Fcm_notif.Notification.Android >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Comet"| module Comet >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides function to monitor communications between the server
    clients~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Connect_phone"| module Connect_phone >> ||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Core_db"| module Core_db >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines low level functions for database requests~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Current_user"| module Current_user >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions and types to manage the current user~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="D"| module Icons.D >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Data"| module Fcm_notif.Data >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Date"| module Date >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Time zone and date management for ~Web applications~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Db"| module Db >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines low level functions for database requests~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Default_config"| module Page.Default_config >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A default configuration for pages~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Email"| module Email >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Basic module for sending e~-mail messages to users~,
    using some local sendmail program~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Email"| module Db.Email >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module is used for low~-level email management with database~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Email_or_phone"| module Lib.Email_or_phone >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse strings that can be e~-mails or phones~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="F"| module Icons.F >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Fcm_notif"| module Fcm_notif >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Send push notifications to ~Android and i~O~S mobile devices~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Group"| module Types.Group >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Group"| module Group >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Groups of users~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Groups"| module Db.Groups >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module is low~-level and used to manage groups of user~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\H|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Handlers"| module Handlers >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module contains pre~-defined handlers for connect~, disconnect~, sign up~,
    add a new email~, etc~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Http"| module Lib.Http >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module contains functions about ~H~T~T~P request~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Icons"| module Icons >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The icons used internally by ~Ocsigen ~Start~'s library~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Ios"| module Fcm_notif.Notification.Ios >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Notification >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Lib"| module Lib >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module aims to provide common utilities functions~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Make"| module Request_cache.Make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Functor which creates a module <<a_api subproject="server" | module type Request_cache.Cache_sig >>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Make"| module Page.Make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Make"| module Notif.Make >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|see <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Eliom~.~Notif~.~Make>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Make_Simple"| module Notif.Make_Simple >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Use this functor in case messages are to be delivered only to clients
    connected to the current server~, as is always the case in a single~-server
    set~-up~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Msg"| module Msg >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions to display messages ~(client~-side or
    server~-side~)~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\N|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Notif"| module Notif >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Server to client notifications~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Notification"| module Fcm_notif.Notification >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides an interface to create the ~J~S~O~N for the notification
    key~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\O|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Opt"| module Session.Opt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Opt"| module Page.Make.Opt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page.Make >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Opt"| module Current_user.Opt >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Instead of exception~, the module <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Opt>> returns an option~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Options"| module Fcm_notif.Options >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\P|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="PGOCaml"| module Core_db.PGOCaml >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Page"| module Page >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Functor defining wrappers for services handlers returning pages~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Phone"| module Db.Phone >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Manage user phone numbers
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="PhoneGap"| module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The ~Cordova plugin phonegap~-plugin~-push interprets some payloads defined
        in the data key~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Platform"| module Platform >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~About device platform~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Priority"| module Fcm_notif.Options.Priority >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Options >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This modules defines a type for priorities for the notifications~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Priority"| module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Priority >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Register"| module Icons.Register >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Request_cache"| module Request_cache >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Caching request data to avoid doing the same computation several times
    during the same request~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Response"| module Fcm_notif.Response >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Results"| module Fcm_notif.Response.Results >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Response >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Services"| module Services >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides pre~-defined services for connect~, disconnect~, sign up~,
    add a new email~, etc~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Session"| module Session >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Connection and disconnection of users~,
    restrict access to services or server functions~,
    define actions to be executed at some points of the session~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Style"| module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Style >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Tips"| module Tips >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Tips for new users and new features~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Types"| module Types >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Data types
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Uploader"| module Uploader >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines functions to manipulate images to be uploaded~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="User"| module User >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions and types about users~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="User"| module Types.User >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="User"| module Db.User >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module is used for low~-level user management with database~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="User_proxy"| module User_proxy >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a cache of user using ~<~<a~_api project~="eliom" ~|
    module ~Eliom~.~Cscache~>~> which allows to keep synchronized the cache between
    the client and the server~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="User_view"| module User_view >> |<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines functions to create password forms~, connection forms~,
    settings buttons and other common contents arising in applications~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api subproject="server" text="Visibility"| module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap.Visibility >> ~[<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif.Data.PhoneGap >>~]||
\\
